name: socialforge
description: Open-source agency-grade social media production engine — calendar parsing, asset-first compositing, AI image generation (Vertex AI Nano Banana Pro), AI video generation (WaveSpeed Kling v3.0 Pro), multi-platform copy adaptation, human-in-the-loop review galleries, and C2PA content provenance signing for EU AI Act Article 50 compliance. 16 skills, 25 commands, 5 agents, 22 scripts, 10 HTTP MCP connectors. Four creative modes (ANCHOR_COMPOSE / ENHANCE_EXTEND / STYLE_REFERENCED / PURE_CREATIVE). v1.9.0 (2026-05-27): native OpenAI Codex manifest with real published schema (replaces the invented schema correctly removed in v1.8.5). Same skills/ directory shared with .claude-plugin/ and gemini-extension.json (Agent Skills open standard).

interface.shortDescription: Agency-grade social media production engine — calendar parsing, asset-first compositing, AI image + video generation, C2PA signing.
interface.longDescription: SocialForge brings a complete monthly social media production pipeline to OpenAI Codex via 16 portable Agent Skills. Take monthly content calendars, match brand assets, generate AI-composed creative (Vertex AI Nano Banana Pro), render carousels, produce AI-generated video clips (WaveSpeed Kling v3.0 Pro), adapt copy per platform (Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, Threads, X, Facebook, YouTube Shorts), produce review galleries and delivery documents — with C2PA content provenance signed into every AI-generated image/video before delivery. Four creative modes: ANCHOR_COMPOSE (brand photo is centerpiece, AI generates scene around it), ENHANCE_EXTEND (brand photo is base, AI extends periphery), STYLE_REFERENCED (AI generates using brand's style reference photos as visual DNA), PURE_CREATIVE (AI generates from text prompt + brand colors/mood). 10 opt-in HTTP MCP connectors (all Cowork-compatible). Zero global hooks.
defaultPrompt: Set up a new brand for social media production.
Index a brand's photo library so AI can match assets to upcoming posts.
Start a new monthly production cycle for the brand and generate all creative.
Build a review gallery so the client can approve creative before delivery.
